title: Production Architecture & Platform Evolution
description: Multi-tenancy, reliability, SRE, cost, migration, reference architectures, platform roadmaps

lessons.title: Why Production Data Platforms Are Different
lessons.description: Day-2 operations, the gap between dev and production; reliability, cost, multi-tenancy, observability at scale

lessons.title: Reference Architectures
lessons.description: Three composable blueprints: managed-cloud-first, Kubernetes-centric, hybrid/regulated; end-to-end integration scenario

lessons.title: Multi-Tenancy, Reliability & SRE for Data
lessons.description: Tenant isolation, data-native SLIs, error budgets, burn-rate alerting, data incident runbooks

lessons.title: Cost Optimization at Scale
lessons.description: Unit economics at platform scale, storage tiering, compute right-sizing, chargeback models, TCO-based decisions

lessons.title: Migration Strategies & Platform Roadmaps
lessons.description: Strangler fig, parallel run, shadow mode; exit criteria, rollback plans, ownership transfer, decommission milestones
